## Review checklist for the WAI Team, in addition to standard code review

- [ ] The page helps users understand its purpose and if it will meet their needs.
- [ ] There is a clear distinction between content "proposed", "approved" by working groups, and "deprecated".
- [ ] [WAI site theme](https://wai-website-theme.netlify.app/) components are properly used.
- [ ] URLs are [clean](https://w3c.studio24.net/docs/url-strategy/#clean-urls), [lower-case](https://w3c.studio24.net/docs/url-strategy/#standardise-on-lower-case-urls), [short](https://w3c.studio24.net/docs/url-strategy/#prefer-short-urls), [preferably shallow](https://w3c.studio24.net/docs/url-strategy/#prefer-shallow-urls), [hackable](https://w3c.studio24.net/docs/url-strategy/#hackable-urls), and do not contain sensitive or personal information. 
- [ ] Content follows the [style guide](https://wai-website-theme.netlify.app/style-guide/).
